title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Compass Group India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Compass Group India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Compass Group India Digital Technologies in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Compass Group India Digital Technologies:
Compass Group India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India Digital Technologies!
